title: Bump compiler submodule for Runtime CI fixes

source.subject: chore(compiler): bump submodule for Runtime CI fixes.

body:
Superrepo pointer bump brings compiler Runtime CI green after v0.3 stabilization, keeping main trustworthy for v0.4 parallel workstreams.

- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope

- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped
